name: architext
description: Maintain machine-readable architecture documentation and Release Truth for repositories that use docs/architext/data JSON or the architext CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain architecture maps and Release Truth.
interface.longDescription: Architext helps Codex keep machine-readable architecture documentation, C4 views, data movement, project rules, roadmap, and Release Truth current for repositories that use docs/architext/data JSON or the architext CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use Architext to validate this repository.
Update the architecture map for this change.
Review Release Truth for the current scope.
